selectors.description: Primary heading for the IdP control-plane workspace
Create or adopt the recommended tenant set
Create or adopt the recommended client set
Structured tenant row fallback when semantic row labels drift
selectors.justification: Used only when the control-plane table structure still exists but semantic tenant row labels drift enough to make exact row text unsafe.
selectors.driftSignal: Raise selector-drift warning if tenant rows cannot be resolved by their semantic labels.

selectors.description: Structured client row fallback when semantic row labels drift
selectors.justification: Used only when the client table still exposes structured rows but application-family labels drift enough to make direct semantic lookup unsafe.
selectors.driftSignal: Raise selector-drift warning if application or machine client rows no longer expose the expected semantic labels.
